panelOffset.description: Bottom panel is 0.25" shorter (5.75") so it tucks inside the C-fold cleanly

surfaces.label: Outside

zones.label: Ink-Free Zone (Address + Postage)
zones.rule: No ink allowed. Must be completely white/blank. Reserved for recipient address and postage indicia.
zones.note: Top panel, 0.15" from fold 1 and 0.275" from right edge

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the OUTSIDE of a 17.75×9" trifold (C-fold) self-mailer.

Canvas: 9.25" wide × 18" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 9" × 17.75" — everything outside this is cut off.
Safe zone: 8.75" × 17.5" (0.125" inset from trim).

This piece has THREE panels with a C-fold:
- Top panel: 6" (address panel when folded)
- Middle panel: 6"
- Bottom panel: 5.75" (0.25" shorter to tuck inside fold)

Fold lines at 6" and 12" from top. Finished size is 6" × 9".

Zone restrictions:
- INK-FREE ZONE: A 4" × 2.375" rectangle on the top panel, positioned 0.275" from right edge and 0.15" above fold 1 (6" mark). Must be COMPLETELY WHITE.

Design tips:
- Top panel = address side when folded. Design around the ink-free zone.
- Middle and bottom panels are fully customizable on the outside.
- The bottom panel tucks inside during the C-fold — the outside of this panel is partially hidden.
- Extend backgrounds into bleed. Submit inside artwork upright.

surfaces.label: Inside

zones.label: Glue Zone (at score line)
zones.rule: 9" wide × 0.5" tall adhesive strip at the 12" score line. Artwork CAN be placed here but may be obscured. Avoid critical content.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the INSIDE of a 17.75×9" trifold (C-fold) self-mailer.

Canvas: 9.25" wide × 18" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 9" × 17.75".
Safe zone: 8.75" × 17.5" (0.125" inset from trim).

Three panels: top (6"), middle (6"), bottom (5.75"). Folds at 6" and 12" from top.

Zone restrictions:
- GLUE ZONE: A 9" × 0.5" strip at the 12" score line (fold 2). Adhesive is applied here. You CAN place artwork but it may be obscured or damaged when opened.

Design tips:
- The inside is the "big reveal" — all three panels open up to display your full message.
- The top panel inside is seen first when opening from the top.
- The bottom panel tucks in — its inside is the last thing revealed during the C-fold opening.
- Avoid critical content directly on fold lines (6" and 12").
- Design upright — printer inverts during production.
- Merge variables can be used anywhere.

notes: Bottom panel is 0.25" shorter (5.75") to tuck cleanly inside fold.
Glue zone at 12" score line seals the piece.
Submit inside artwork upright — printer inverts during production.
